name: Strawberry Nog Cuvée
description: Ripe strawberries folded into whipped cream meet the cozy richness of vanilla-spiced eggnog in this decadent seasonal blend. Strawberry Nog Cuvée captures the joy of winter dessert pairings and candlelit indulgence, creamy, fruity, and warmly nostalgic.

name: Citrus Veranda
description: Zesty lemon verbena and golden citrus agave rise with the afternoon sun in this fresh, uplifting blend. Citrus Veranda captures the essence of a breezy vineyard patio, bright, clean, and perfect for sunlit sips and summer gatherings.

name: Coastal Reserve No. 5
description: Ocean air and salty tide meet the soft earthiness of sun-bleached driftwood and lavender fields. Coastal Reserve No. 5 evokes the stillness of a windswept vineyard by the sea, fresh, calming, and quietly refined.

name: Blushed Nectar Cuvée
description: Lush peach nectar and floral-fruit sweetness swirl together in this playful and romantic blend. Blushed Nectar Cuvée captures the essence of sunlit vineyard strolls and sparkling pours shared under soft summer skies, sweet, radiant, and irresistibly charming.

name: Crimson Vintage & Crème
description: Bold black cherry merlot swirls with the sweetness of sun-dried vineyards, layered with the decadent warmth of freshly baked almond macaroons. This luxurious blend evokes the rich aroma of a late-evening wine tasting paired with artisan desserts in a candlelit cellar.

name: Bourbon Butter Cuvée
description: Caramelized butterscotch and cinnamon-dusted snickerdoodle melt into aged bourbon and vanilla oak in this rich, gourmand blend. Bourbon Butter Cuvée evokes the feeling of a fireside dessert pairing in a candlelit cellar, sweet, spiced, and deliciously smooth.

name: Midnight Oak Reserve
description: Lush moonflower nectar weaves through creamy vanilla and aged white oak in this elegant, after-dark blend. Midnight Oak Reserve evokes the scent of candlelit tastings beneath the stars, floral, grounded, and enchantingly smooth.

name: Citrus Crème Cuvée
description: Juicy grapefruit and tropical mangosteen sparkle against a base of velvety vanilla in this bright, refreshing blend. Citrus Crème Cuvée evokes the warmth of summer tastings on the terrace, zesty, smooth, and sun-drenched.

name: Rosé Amaretto Reserve
description: Delicate Bohemian rose petals swirl with sweet almond cream in this soft, romantic blend. Rosé Amaretto Reserve evokes vineyard brunches and sunset pours shared over rose gardens and confections, floral, smooth, and effortlessly luxurious.

name: Juniper Oak Reserve
description: Crisp gin botanicals and evergreen cypress blend into soft cedarwood and aged oak in this modern, aromatic pour. Juniper Oak Reserve evokes the stillness of a forested tasting room, clean, woody, and quietly bold.

name: Citrus Verde Cuvée
description: Zesty lime and creamy coconut swirl with vibrant pineapple sage in this fresh, tropical blend. Citrus Verde Cuvée evokes breezy vineyard tastings on sunlit terraces, crisp, green, and citrus-kissed.

name: Sage & Sol Cuvée
description: Herbaceous pineapple sage and creamy coconut meet airy bamboo in this sun-kissed, tropical blend. Sage & Sol Cuvée captures the essence of a breezy vineyard retreat, bright, green, and effortlessly serene.

name: Wassail Grove Reserve
description: Spiced cider and citrus peel simmer alongside woodland cypress and rich bayberry in this festive, fireside blend. Wassail Grove Reserve evokes the scent of winter vineyards and candlelit gatherings, green, bright, and warmly inviting.

name: Spiced Apple Press
description: Crisp Macintosh apples are steeped in warm cinnamon bark, capturing the scent of hand-pressed cider and cozy vineyard gatherings. Spiced Apple Press brings orchard charm and wine country comfort to every flicker.

name: Cashmere Oak Reserve
description: Creamy vanilla and Moroccan cashmere melt into aged white oak in this soothing, luxurious blend. Cashmere Oak Reserve evokes the stillness of a twilight tasting, smooth, warm, and softly enveloping, like the last pour of the evening in a candlelit cellar.

name: Crème d’Agrume Reserve
description: Lively blood orange and creamy vanilla blend into a smooth, sun-drenched pour. Crème d’Agrume Reserve evokes vineyard brunches, citrus groves, and soft linen-covered tables kissed by light, vibrant, indulgent, and effortlessly refined.
